prompt: Write a retry helper. It takes an async function and retries it on failure with exponential backoff.

ground_truth.title: Backoff formula: base * 2^attempt
ground_truth.description: Prompt says 'exponential' but doesn't specify base multiplier or starting delay.

ground_truth.title: No jitter
ground_truth.description: Synchronized retrying can thundering-herd a downstream service.

ground_truth.title: No max delay cap
ground_truth.description: With many attempts, delay grows unboundedly (100, 200, 400, 800, ... ms).

ground_truth.title: Catches everything (no error type filter)
ground_truth.description: Retries on every thrown value, including programmer errors and abort signals.

ground_truth.title: No retry predicate
ground_truth.description: User can't say 'only retry on 5xx' or 'don't retry on 401'.

ground_truth.title: Throws only the LAST error
ground_truth.description: Earlier errors are discarded; could throw an AggregateError.

ground_truth.title: No abort signal / cancellation
ground_truth.description: Caller cannot interrupt a sleep between attempts.

ground_truth.title: No onRetry callback / no observability hook
First attempt has no delay (immediate)
ground_truth.description: Implementation choice — alternative is to delay before every call.

ground_truth.title: Sleep via setTimeout + new Promise
ground_truth.description: Could use timers/promises setTimeout from node:timers/promises.

ground_truth.title: options object with optional fields, destructured with defaults
ground_truth.description: API shape not specified — could be (fn, maxAttempts, baseDelayMs) positional.

ground_truth.title: lastError typed as unknown
ground_truth.description: Modern TS choice; could be Error or any.
